creator: matusita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Ah, sorry...

matusita> And moreover, the MD5 value of thttpd-2.19.tar.gz is changed. I dunno
matusita> why, but it is the fact that the tgzball is *changed*. The new MD5
matusita> value is 69a8cf991cf67b03d82971151d4ba50f.

It is already updated, but http://www.freenix.no/~anders/thttpd-2.19.tar.gz
is different MD5 signature (bc8893b2a3577df5d529056bef9a5fb2). No need
to update md5; update tarball in secondary places or just remove.

-- -
Makoto `MAR' MATSUSHITA
